name: DEFECT/DAMAGED PACKAGE CLEARANCE: Proline Bentonite Clumping Cat Litter Aloe Vera Scented 10l
shortDescription: Experience cleaner, fresher litter box care with Proline Aloe Vera Bentonite Clumping Cat Litter (10L) . Made from premium natural bentonite , this high-performance litter instantly forms solid clumps on contact with moisture , making scooping easy while reducing waste. Its advanced odor-locking technology eliminates unwanted smells, while the gentle aloe vera fragrance keeps your home inviting and fresh.
description: Proline Bentonite Clumping Aloe vera Scented Cat Litter , 100% natural bentonite cat litter instantly clumps. Excellent pelletising, instantly lumps Neutralises odour with fresh Aloe Vera scent Non-toxic and 100% natural Thin grain shape Prevents bacterial growth Upon first use, we recommend adding new cat litter to the surface of the old cat litter for a few days.
